summary: This document outlines the Post-Market Clinical Follow-Up (PMCF) plan for KeepMeCompany's AI Doctor & Patient Consultation Platform. It details the device's core functionality, technical infrastructure including UK/EU cloud hosting and encryption, and compliance with GDPR and NHS data security standards. The plan also covers implementation processes, user demographics, and security protocols for GP practices.
